real.name: 真人 ASMR
real.vision_prompt: Analyze this real-person ASMR video frame. Focus on hand movements, props near microphone, and facial expressions.
real.audio_prompt: Focus on real-person vocal triggers: whisper, mouth sounds, breathing. Also detect physical object sounds.

live2d.name: Live2D VTuber
live2d.vision_prompt: Analyze this Live2D VTuber frame. Note character expressions, background changes, and on-screen actions.
live2d.audio_prompt: Standard VTuber audio analysis. Detect voice, sound effects, BGM segments.

3d.name: 3D VTuber
3d.vision_prompt: Analyze this 3D VTuber frame. Note camera angles, character poses, scene props, lighting.
3d.audio_prompt: 3D VTuber audio. Detect spatial audio cues, voice, environmental sounds.

vrchat.name: VRChat
vrchat.vision_prompt: Analyze this VRChat frame. Note avatar actions, world environment, UI elements.
vrchat.audio_prompt: VRChat audio. Detect voice chat, world sounds, music players.

tutorial.name: 教学视频
tutorial.vision_prompt: Analyze this tutorial video frame. Focus on demonstrated actions, tools used, text/annotations on screen.
tutorial.audio_prompt: Tutorial audio. Focus on spoken instructions, demonstration sounds.

gaming.name: 游戏视频
gaming.vision_prompt: Analyze this gaming video frame. Note game UI, character actions, scene type, on-screen events.
gaming.audio_prompt: Gaming audio. Detect game sounds, voice commentary, background music.
